secret_key_ref.description: KMS-wrapped Stripe secret key. Plaintext inputs are encrypted before persistence and never exposed in read responses.

webhook_secret_ref.description: KMS-wrapped Stripe webhook signing secret. Plaintext inputs are encrypted before persistence and never exposed in read responses.

connect_access_token_ref.description: KMS-wrapped Stripe Connect OAuth access token. Stored by the OAuth callback and never exposed in read responses.

connect_refresh_token_ref.description: KMS-wrapped Stripe Connect OAuth refresh token. Stored by the OAuth callback and never exposed in read responses.
